testcase.name: test_pause_trip_endpoint
testcase.error: tests/test_mileage_pause_resume.py:23: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"code":"4399"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pause_already_paused_trip_fails
testcase.error: tests/test_mileage_pause_resume.py:23: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"code":"4399"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
